audit_select_admin.name: audit_select_admin
audit_select_admin.using:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE ((p.id = auth.uid()) AND (lower(p.role) = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'super_admin'::text])))))

kontak_pesan_select_admin.name: kontak_pesan_select_admin
kontak_pesan_select_admin.using:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE ((p.id = auth.uid()) AND (lower(p.role) = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'super_admin'::text])))))
